title: iNeuron Pre-Differentiation and Differentiation Protocol
author: Merissa Chen
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bcrjiv4n

steps.title: WTc11 iPSC Culture and Maintenance by Martin Kampmann
steps.instruction: WTc11 iPSC Culture and Maintenance by Martin Kampmann

steps.title: Pre-Differentiation and Differentiation Notes
steps.instruction: Pre-Differentiation and Differentiation Notes: 1. Keep reagents at 4 °C for a maximum of 4 weeks, If needing long term storage, don’t freeze-thaw more than 3 times. 2. Sometimes pre-differentiated cells take a long time to come off of the plate on Day 0. This is usually okay. It is important that your cells are single cells. 3. Feeding schedule and volumes: Make N2 Pre-differentiation Media: %s %s

steps.title: Coat plate with matrigel diluted in Knockout DMEM
steps.instruction: Coat plate with matrigel diluted in Knockout DMEM. Coat for at least 00:30:00 (or O/N). Coated plates can last in the 37 °C incubator for 14 days.

steps.title: Aspirate media from iPSCs and wash with DPBS
steps.instruction: Aspirate media from iPSCs and wash with DPBS.

steps.title: Add Accutase and incubate at 37...
steps.instruction: Add Accutase and incubate at 37 °C for 00:03:00 ; if necessary, incubate for additional time up to 00:07:00 .

steps.title: Use gentle agitation to release cells,...
steps.instruction: Use gentle agitation to release cells, and collect in an Eppendorf tube or conical with DPBS.

steps.title: Spin cells at 200 x g...
steps.instruction: Spin cells at 200 x g for 00:05:00 resuspend in N2 pre-diff media.

steps.title: Count cells and add desired amount...
steps.instruction: Count cells and add desired amount to an Eppendorf tube or conical, spin, resuspend in N2 pre-differentiation media, and plate onto Matrigel-coated cell culture vessels for the pre-differentiation. Reference seeding density chart for plating

steps.title: Perform ½ pre-differentiation media change every...
steps.instruction: Perform ½ pre-differentiation media change every day (w/dox, no RI) throughout days 0-3 pre-differentiation period or full media change on day -1 or day -2. Be consistent.

steps.title: Going into differentiation, it is best...
steps.instruction: Going into differentiation, it is best if cells are in single-cell suspension. Optional: use cell strainer.

steps.title: Pre-differentiated cells can be frozen in...
steps.instruction: Pre-differentiated cells can be frozen in 10%DMSO + N2/B27 Differentiation media (**can also freeze in pre-diff media).

steps.title: Make N2/B27 Differentiation Media
steps.instruction: Make N2/B27 Differentiation Media: %s %s

steps.title: Aspirate media and wash with DPBS
steps.instruction: Aspirate media and wash with DPBS.

steps.title: Add Accutase and incubate at 37...
steps.instruction: Add Accutase and incubate at 37 °C for 00:03:00 ; if necessary, incubate for additional time up to 00:07:00 .

steps.title: Use gentle agitation to release cells,...
steps.instruction: Use gentle agitation to release cells, and collect in an Eppendorf tube or conical with DPBS.

steps.title: Spin cells at 200 x g for 00:05:00
steps.instruction: Spin cells at 200 x g for 00:05:00 .

steps.title: Carefully aspirate DPBS/accutase solution and resuspend...
steps.instruction: Carefully aspirate DPBS/accutase solution and resuspend in Classic N2/B27 Differentiation Media.

steps.title: Count cells, dilute to appropriate density,...
steps.instruction: Count cells, dilute to appropriate density, and plate onto PDL-coated cell culture vessels.

steps.title: Leftover cells can be frozen down...
steps.instruction: Leftover cells can be frozen down in pre-differentiation media + 10% DMSO.

steps.title: Full media change on day 3...
steps.instruction: Full media change on day 3 post-plating, once debris is observed.

steps.title: Pipet at the wall of the plate
steps.instruction: Pipet at the wall of the plate. DO NOT TOUCH BOTTOM OF PLATE! Be extra careful with 96 well plates.

steps.title: Change Classic N2/B27 Differentiation media at...
steps.instruction: Change Classic N2/B27 Differentiation media at minimum once every week without dox or rock inhibitor.

steps.title: Closely monitor
steps.instruction: Closely monitor. Wait for a week at minimum before using for experiment. Preferably, use after 2 weeks.
